$comment: FROZEN prompt artifact v1 (P3, DEC-P3-4/P3_SPEC §2.2). Intent taxonomy + slot vocabulary + preamble contract, hash-pinned in prompts.lock.json as part of prompt_hash. Six labels mapping 1:1 onto the frozen TOOL_SCHEMA v0 surface; slot keys reuse the refine_filter.by vocabulary plus plot_description and title — nothing invented.

intents.find_by_plot: User describes a film by story/plot (maps to search_by_plot).
intents.find_by_title: User names a title, possibly misspelled/transliterated/code-mixed (maps to resolve_title).
intents.list_versions: User wants all language versions of a work (maps to get_versions).
intents.refine: Turn narrows the standing conversational version set (maps to refine_filter).
intents.disambiguate: Title spans more than one work; the assistant asks one clarifying question (GS-10 ask-back).
intents.out_of_catalog: Catalog produced no match; the assistant abstains (NO_MATCH).

preamble.$comment: Machine-read contract for the per-turn intent/slot prediction (P3_SPEC §2.4). Placement: the FINAL prose answer of each user turn (the assistant message without tool calls) begins with exactly one preamble line; tool-calling messages carry none — out_of_catalog is only knowable after tool results, so the preamble sits on the answer, not the first response.
preamble.format: single line; after the prefix, one compact JSON object
